title: TrustForge Permission Grant
description: Daemon-signed reply to a PermissionRequest. When granted, the bearer can present this to the RpcServer to authorize the requested action within the listed constraints; when denied, audits still see the reason and the policy decision the engine produced.

grant_version.description: Version of the permission-grant schema itself.

request_id.description: Identifier of the PermissionRequest this grant resolves.

capability.description: Capability the bearer may exercise. Present only when decision=allow.

constraints.description: Constraints attached to the grant (time window, target glob, quorum, ...).

policy_decision.description: PolicyDecision the engine produced while evaluating the request.

ceremony_id.description: Approval ceremony that resolved the request, if any.

issuer.description: Daemon actor that signed this grant.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical form of this grant.
